description: New publish methods — `PublishAsStaticWebsite`, `PublishAsNodeServer`, and `PublishAsNpmScript` — let developers deploy JavaScript and TypeScript apps to containers or static site hosts. The new `AddNextJsApp` method provides a dedicated Next.js integration with standalone output support. YARP is used for static site serving with optional API reverse proxy via service discovery.
name: JavaScript publish methods and AddNextJsApp
